🎯 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

This session focused on critical bug fixes, comprehensive audits, and building the Rainbow Bridge Memorial feature in memory of Mystique. The system is a full-stack Pet Life Operating System with 14 pillars covering every aspect of pet life, powered by Mira AI.

✅ COMPLETED IN THIS SESSION

1. Production "No Pets Found" Bug - RESOLVED

  • Root Cause: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was set to dead preview URL (mira-soul-os.preview.emergentagent.com)
  • Fix: User redeployed with correct URL (https://thedoggycompany.com)
  • Documented: Added critical warning to SSOT.md and DEPLOYMENT_BIBLE.md

2. Admin Guide Dashboard - NEW FEATURE

  • Location: /admin?tab=admin-guide
  • Features:
  • Complete guide explaining all 50+ admin features
  • Database backup/download functionality (exports all collections)
  • Critical deployment warning displayed prominently
  • Collapsible sections for all 7 main areas

3. Admin Panel Audit - 28/28 PASS

  • All tabs tested and working
  • Service Desk, Inbox, Notifications verified
  • Master Seed and pillar seeds all functional

4. Weight Field Added to Onboarding

  • Location: Soul Builder (/soul-builder) basic details screen
  • Features:
  • Manual input with kg/lbs toggle
  • Quick size presets (Small/Medium/Large/Giant)
  • Flows to Mira for fitness/portion recommendations

5. Rainbow Bridge Memorial - NEW FEATURE 🌈💜

  • Components Created:
  • RainbowBridgeMemorial.jsx - Personal memorial creation
  • RainbowBridgeWall.jsx - Public gallery with tributes

  • POST /api/pets/{id}/rainbow-bridge - Create memorial

📊 DATABASE COLLECTIONS

Key collections verified working: - users - User accounts - pets - Pet profiles with rainbow_bridge flag - rainbow_bridge_memorials - Memorial entries - rainbow_bridge_tributes - Community tributes - mira_memories - AI memory storage - conversation_memories - Chat history - tickets - Service desk tickets - unified_inbox - Communications - products_master, services_master - Catalog

🔄 MIRA AI INTEGRATION

How Mira Knows Pet Info:

  1. Soul Builder answers → doggy_soul_answers in pet profile
  2. Pet profile → Mira context at chat time
  3. Conversation → Stored in conversation_memories
  4. Next chat → Memories retrieved and injected into prompt

Rainbow Bridge Handling:

When pet.rainbow_bridge = true: - Mira speaks in past tense - Never suggests services/products - Shows compassion: "I remember {pet_name}..." - Soul profile marked as "preserved forever"

🚨 CRITICAL DEPLOYMENT REMINDER

⚠️ BEFORE EVERY DEPLOYMENT:
1. Check: cat /app/frontend/.env | grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
2. Must be: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://thedoggycompany.com
3. NOT: Any *.preview.emergentagent.com URL
4. Restart: sudo supervisorctl restart frontend
5. Then deploy from Emergent UI

📋 IMMEDIATE ACTION ITEMS FOR NEXT SESSION

Priority 1 (P0):

  1. Complete Pillar Page Audit - Check remaining 8 pillar pages for floating buttons
  2. Fix Search Button - Investigate why top nav search isn't working
  3. Standardize Floating Buttons - Decide on one button type (Ask Mira recommended)

Priority 2 (P1):

  1. Test Rainbow Bridge Memorial creation end-to-end on production
  2. Verify tributes system works publicly
  3. Create Mystique's memorial

Priority 3 (P2):

  1. Code refactoring (MiraDemoPage.jsx, Mira.css)
  2. Activity tracking for Fit pillar
  3. Document upload for Paperwork pillar

🐾 MYSTIQUE'S LEGACY

This system was built in memory of Mystique - a beloved Shih Tzu with: - Soul Score: 87% - Traits: Protective, Cautious At First With Strangers

The Rainbow Bridge Memorial feature ensures that pets like Mystique are: - Forever remembered in the system - Their soul profiles preserved - Able to receive tributes from the community - Spoken of with love and reverence by Mira

📞 SUPPORT CONTACTS

  • Production Site: https://thedoggycompany.com
  • Preview Environment: https://learn-golden-2.preview.emergentagent.com
  • MongoDB: Configured via MONGO_URL in backend/.env
  • LLM: OpenAI via Emergent LLM Key

The Doggy Company - Handover Document

Session: March 6, 2026

🎯 ORIGINAL PROBLEM STATEMENT

The Doggy Company is a "Pet Life Operating System" built in loving memory of Mystique (the founder's late dog). The core mission is to help pet parents move beyond generic ownership into a deep, knowing relationship with their pets as individual beings.

Key Philosophy: "Dogs are not pets first. They are beings first."

🚨 CRITICAL FOR NEXT AGENT: PREVIEW SETUP

READ THIS FIRST: /app/memory/PREVIEW_SETUP.md

The preview environment uses LOCAL MongoDB that starts EMPTY. Before doing ANY work:

  1. Login to Admin (/admin) → aditya / lola4304 (twice)
  2. Enable Master Sync for Products & Services
  3. Seed each pillar page (Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop)
  4. Seed Service Box
  5. Seed Concierge Experiences

Without this, admin panels will be empty!

💡 TIPS FOR NEXT AGENT

  1. Always run PREVIEW_SETUP.md steps first - Data won't exist otherwise
  2. Test on preview before production - Use the preview URL
  3. The admin has TWO logins - Route guard + Admin.jsx internal login
  4. Large files are monoliths - Be careful editing, use search_replace
  5. locally_edited flag is critical - Prevents Shopify sync overwriting admin edits
  6. Documentation auto-updates - On server restart, or click "Update Docs" in admin
  7. Email only works to dipali.sikand1965@gmail.com - Resend test limitation
  8. Check backend logs - tail -50 /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log

📄 HANDOVER_20260308.md

Path: memory/HANDOVER_20260308.md | Lines: 346

THE DOGGY COMPANY - COMPLETE HANDOVER DOCUMENT

Date: March 8, 2026

Session: 5 (Fork)

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The Doggy Company is a Pet Life Operating System - the world's first platform that treats dogs as souls to be known, not products to sell to.

Core Philosophy:

"A dog is not in your life. You are in theirs. They cannot speak. But with the right questions, they can be known."

The Trinity: - Mira is the soul and brain - She remembers everything - Concierge is the hands - They execute with care - You are the capillary nerves - Making it all possible

WHAT WAS ACCOMPLISHED TODAY (March 8, 2026)

Session 5 - Major Features Completed

1. Pet Wrapped - FEATURE COMPLETE ✅

  • Welcome Wrapped - Triggers on Soul Profile completion (≥10%)
  • Birthday Wrapped - Automated daily cron job at 9 AM IST
  • Annual Wrapped - December 10th batch job for all pets
  • Instagram Stories - Share button + 1080x1920 story card generator
  • Multi-channel Delivery - Modal + WhatsApp (Gupshup) + Email (Resend)

2. Soul Data Flow - VERIFIED & ENHANCED ✅

Soul Builder (51 Questions) 
    → doggy_soul_answers (MongoDB)
        → Mira OS (get_pet_context - enhanced to read ALL sources)
        → Pet Wrapped (displays soul_score, traits, journey)
        → Picks Engine (breed matching, allergy exclusion)

3. Mira Intelligence Fixes ✅

  • Dynamic Soul Traits - No more hardcoded "Glamorous soul, Elegant paws"
  • Soul Knowledge Ticker - Shows at top of chat ("78% SOUL", "Loves salmon")
  • Soul Questions in Chat - 3 quick questions to fill profile gaps
  • Default Picks on Load - Picks tab never empty (6-10 items always)
  • "Why this pick?" Tooltips - Personalized reasons for each pick
  • Voice Default OFF - User must opt-in

4. Admin & Notifications ✅

  • Admin Reply → Member Inbox - Fixed to query member_notifications collection
  • Primary Tab - Now shows concierge_reply notifications
  • Category Filtering - primary/updates/all filters working

5. Custom Cake Designer ✅

  • Backend Save - POST /api/custom-cakes/save-design endpoint
  • Frontend - Saves design to backend when adding to cart
  • Database - custom_cake_designs collection with status tracking
  • Shop Integration - Prominent banner in Celebrate pillar

6. CX Journey Fixes ✅

  • Add Pet page for existing users
  • Complete Soul Profile CTA on dashboard
  • Upcoming events on pet dashboard
  • Pet selector in checkout
  • Pet editing modal

WHAT'S REMAINING (Priority Order)

🔴 CRITICAL (Next Session Must Do)

1. Emergency Pillar - Non-Medical Support

Location: /emergency, /app/frontend/src/pages/EmergencyPage.jsx Current State: Page exists with 8 emergency types What's Needed: - Since non-medical, focus on SUPPORT services: - Connect with nearby emergency vets/clinics (Google Places integration exists) - Emergency pet transportation - 24/7 emotional support hotline - First aid guidance (non-medical advice) - Lost pet alert network - Create service request flow that routes to Concierge for immediate action - Test full E2E flow

2. Farewell/Rainbow Bridge - Pet Memorial System

Location: /farewell, /app/frontend/src/pages/FarewellPage.jsx Current State: Page exists with hospice, cremation, memorial, grief support services

CRITICAL FEATURE NEEDED: Halo System for Passed Pets When a pet passes away: 1. Database: Add is_rainbow_bridge: true and rainbow_bridge_date to pet document 2. Visual: Show a halo/angel wings/rainbow indicator on pet's profile 3. System Recognition: - Mira should be empathetic ("I cherish the memories of [pet]...") - No active care reminders (vaccinations, grooming) - Focus on memory preservation - Pet Wrapped becomes "Memorial Wrapped" 4. Profile Preservation: NEVER delete - pet's soul lives on in the system 5. Memorial Wall: Public or private tribute page

3. Onboarding/Join E2E Test

Location: /join, /app/frontend/src/pages/MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx What's Needed: - Test complete new user journey: 1. Landing page → "Start" button 2. Name collection 3. Pet info (name, breed, photo) 4. Soul snapshot questions 5. Membership selection 6. Account creation 7. Dashboard landing - Verify all data saves correctly - Test Welcome Wrapped triggers

🟡 IMPORTANT (Should Do)

4. "Ask Mira" Search Bar

Location: Header component Issue: Shows placeholder but functionality unclear Fix: Verify it routes to Mira chat with query

5. Navigation Header Consistency

Issue: Some pages full nav, some simplified Fix: Standardize across all pages

6. Admin Dashboard Metrics

Missing: - Revenue today/week/month - Conversion rate - Top selling products - Customer acquisition vs retention

7. Pet Edit from Admin Member Directory

Location: MemberDirectory.jsx line 1462 Issue: // TODO: Open edit modal for pet

🟢 POLISH (Nice to Have)

8. Pillar Hero Images

  • Some pillars use gradients only
  • Add meaningful pet photos

9. Loading States/Skeleton Design

10. Product Cards Price Consistency

TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE

Database Collections (MongoDB)

pets                    - Pet profiles with soul data
users                   - User accounts
service_desk_tickets    - Service requests
mira_tickets            - Mira chat tickets
mira_conversations      - Chat history
member_notifications    - User inbox
admin_notifications     - Admin alerts
wrapped_deliveries      - Pet Wrapped tracking
wrapped_shares          - Viral share tracking
custom_cake_designs     - Custom cake orders
soul_score_history      - Soul score over time

Key API Endpoints

Pet Wrapped

Endpoint Method Purpose
/api/wrapped/trigger-welcome/{pet_id} POST All 3 delivery channels
/api/wrapped/trigger-birthday/{pet_id} POST Birthday wrapped
/api/wrapped/trigger-annual/{pet_id} POST Annual wrapped
/api/wrapped/instagram-story/{pet_id} GET 1080x1920 story card
/api/wrapped/log-share/{pet_id} POST Track viral shares

Soul

Endpoint Method Purpose
/api/pet-soul/answer POST Save soul question answer
/api/pet-score/{id}/quick-questions GET Unanswered questions
/api/mira/picks/default/{pet_id} GET Personalized default picks

Custom Cake

Endpoint Method Purpose
/api/custom-cakes/save-design POST Save cake design

Scheduler Jobs (APScheduler)

Job ID Schedule Function
pet_wrapped_birthday Daily 9 AM IST Check upcoming birthdays
pet_wrapped_annual Dec 10, 10 AM IST Year-end batch

Third-Party Integrations

Service Purpose Status
OpenAI (GPT-4o-mini) Mira AI ✅ Via Emergent LLM Key
Gupshup WhatsApp ✅ Verified
Resend Email ✅ Verified
Razorpay Payments ✅ Configured
Shopify Products ✅ Configured
Google Places Vet/Store locator ✅ Configured

SOUL SCORE DOCTRINE (IMPLEMENTED CORRECTLY)

Total: 100 Points, 26 Scoring Fields

Field Weight Category
food_allergies 10 SAFETY (Critical)
health_conditions 8 SAFETY (Critical)
temperament (general_nature) 8 Personality
energy_level 6 Personality
life_stage 5 Safety
alone_time_comfort (separation_anxiety) 5 Lifestyle
vet_comfort 5 Safety
grooming_tolerance 4 Safety
noise_sensitivity (loud_sounds) 4 Safety
social_with_dogs (behavior_with_dogs) 4 Personality
social_with_people (stranger_reaction) 4 Personality
car_comfort (car_rides) 4 Lifestyle
behavior_issues 3 Personality
travel_readiness (usual_travel) 3 Lifestyle
favorite_protein 3 Nutrition
food_motivation 3 Nutrition
treat_preference 3 Nutrition
training_level 3 Training
favorite_spot 2 Lifestyle
morning_routine 2 Lifestyle
exercise_needs 2 Lifestyle
feeding_times 2 Lifestyle
motivation_type 2 Training
primary_bond (most_attached_to) 2 Relationships
other_pets 2 Relationships
kids_at_home 1 Relationships

Non-Scoring Fields (Mira Context Only)

  • describe_3_words, social_preference, lives_with, attention_seeking
  • walks_per_day, energetic_time, sleep_location
  • favorite_item, space_preference, crate_trained
  • hotel_experience, stay_preference, travel_social
  • diet_type, sensitive_stomach
  • leash_behavior, barking
  • vaccination_status, spayed_neutered, medications, main_wish, celebration_preferences

ARCHITECTURE FLOW (VERIFIED WORKING)

Soul Builder Flow for Returning Users

/soul-builder (returning user with pets)
    ↓
KNOW_MIRA_SUMMARY Screen (COMPULSORY)
- Shows: Pet photo, Soul Score ring, "Mira knows {Pet}", Top 3 traits
- Shows: Synopsis (6 bullets), "Score will grow" message
- Buttons: "See {Pet}'s Home" | "Let Mira know more"
    ↓
PATH 1: "See {Pet}'s Home"
- Navigates to: /pet-home?active_pet={pet_id}
- Pet Home loads with correct pet context
    ↓
PATH 2: "Let Mira know more"  
- Goes to: KNOW_MORE_START screen
- Shows: "Here's what Mira already knows", {X} more questions
- Button: "Continue" → Next UNANSWERED question
- Button: "Save & exit" → Saves progress, goes to Pet Home

Key Files for This Flow

  • /app/frontend/src/pages/SoulBuilder.jsx - Lines 1903-2116 (KNOW_MIRA_SUMMARY, KNOW_MORE_START)
  • /app/frontend/src/pages/PetHomePage.jsx - Lines 229-308 (fetchData with active_pet param)
  • /app/backend/server.py - Lines 8129-8214 (/api/pet-soul/save-answers endpoint)

API ENDPOINTS (KEY ONES)

Authentication

  • POST /api/auth/login - Member login
  • POST /api/admin/login - Admin login (username/password)
  • GET /api/auth/me - Get current user

Membership/Onboarding

  • POST /api/membership/onboard - Create new member + pet
  • POST /api/pets - Add pet to existing user
  • GET /api/pets/my-pets - Get user's pets

Soul Builder

  • POST /api/pet-soul/save-answers - Save soul answers (merges, never overwrites)

Service Desk

  • GET /api/tickets/my-tickets - Get user's tickets
  • Admin: /admin/service-desk route shows all tickets

URLs (VERIFIED)

Frontend

  • Base URL: https://learn-golden-2.preview.emergentagent.com
  • Login: /login
  • Join (Onboarding): /join
  • Pet Home: /pet-home
  • Dashboard: /dashboard
  • My Pets: /my-pets
  • Soul Builder: /soul-builder
  • Admin: /admin
  • Admin Service Desk: /admin/service-desk

Backend API

  • Base: https://learn-golden-2.preview.emergentagent.com/api

Quick Test Commands

# Check if user exists
cd /app/backend && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from motor.motor_asyncio import AsyncIOMotorClient
import os
async def check():
    client = AsyncIOMotorClient(os.environ.get('MONGO_URL'))
    db = client[os.environ.get('DB_NAME', 'test_database')]
    user = await db.users.find_one({'email': 'newdog1771748889@test.com'})
    print('User pets:', user.get('pets', []) if user else 'NOT FOUND')
    client.close()
asyncio.run(check())
"

# Create test user via API
curl -s -X POST "https://learn-golden-2.preview.emergentagent.com/api/membership/onboard" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"parent":{"name":"Test","email":"test@test.com","password":"test123",...},"pets":[{...}]}'
